title: MCA § 39-1-101 - Definitions
text:
39-1-101. Definitions. As used in this chapter, unless the context requires otherwise the following definitions apply:

(1) "Commissioner" means the commissioner of labor and industry as provided for in 2-15-1701.

(2) "Department" means the department of labor and industry as provided for in 2-15-1701.

History: History: En. 39-1-101 by Sec. 1, Ch. 397, L. 1979.
chapter: CHAPTER 1. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AND INDUSTRY
